summary: Privacy policy page displays correctly with proper content structure, headings, and navigation. Minor palette deviation from diner brand aesthetic observed but core functionality and legal contract requirements are met.

violations.description: Page uses cream background (#fff8ea) instead of the expected diner teal (#9fd8d2) for primary public page canvas, though the cream treatment is within the declared palette as an acceptable variant for legal pages

actions: Verify the privacy policy content sections match the expected legal contract headings
Confirm the effective date format and positioning meets legal requirements
Test the back navigation link functionality to root path
